about.label: About
about.heading:
Engineer by training,
builder by nature.
about.bio: I work at the intersection of software engineering and AI — designing agents, building interfaces, and connecting the two. I care about systems that work and experiences that feel right.
about.approach: My approach is straightforward: understand the problem deeply, then build the simplest thing that solves it well.

agent.title: Conversational Agent
agent.description: A multi-turn conversational agent built with LangGraph. Memory, tool use, and structured reasoning in a single graph.
